'''GSI''' was a manufacturing company. It produced the [[M-L4 Seeker]], a model of [[Minelayer (starship attachment)|minelayer]] sold for 4,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard|credits]].<ref name="NoDisintegrations" />

==Behind the scenes==
GSI was first mentioned in the new ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[canon]] in [[No Disintegrations (Fantasy Flight Games)|''No Disintegrations'']],<ref name="NoDisintegrations" /> a [[2017]] supplement for the ''[[Star Wars: Edge of the Empire]]'' [[roleplaying game]] published by [[Fantasy Flight Games]].<ref name="A Fistful of Credits">{{FantasyFlightGames|url=en/news/2017/2/2/a-fistful-of-credits|text=A Fistful of Credits}}</ref> The company originated in the [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] continuity, where it first appeared in ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic: Rise of the Hutt Cartel]]'', a [[2013]] expansion to [[BioWare]]'s [[2011]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]''.<ref name="SWTOR RotHC">''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic: Rise of the Hutt Cartel]]''</ref>
